description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called test that runs in the default test stage. The job uses the runner's default Docker image, updates the package list with apt-get update -qy, installs python3-pip via apt-get -y install python3-pip, installs tox using pip3 install tox, and then executes tox -e py34. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
